summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lux Studio public gallery - all core features working correctly including responsive event grid, navigation, WhatsApp contact button, and photo protection features. Unable to test lightbox functionality due to no photos in published events.

minor_bugs.impact: Photo upload functionality may be affected, but doesn't impact public gallery viewing

passed_tests: Public gallery loads correctly at / with responsive grid (3/2/1 columns)
Event cards display event name, date, photographer, and photo count badge
Event page shows event details and metadata
WhatsApp contact button visible with correct wa.me link
Right-click protection enabled on event pages
Responsive design works on desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports
Navigation between gallery and event pages
No photos message displayed correctly when events have 0 photos
API: GET /api/public/events returns published events correctly
API: GET /api/public/events/:id/photos returns empty array for events without photos
Backend authentication and CRUD operations working
Protected photo components render correctly (no errors)

success_percentage.backend: 94% (16/17 tests passed - Cloudinary signature endpoint failing)

action_item_for_main_agent: Consider adding test photos to published events to enable full lightbox testing. Fix Cloudinary signature endpoint if photo upload is needed.
